generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder on first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox on first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder streamed via MQTT"
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox streamed via MQTT"
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data trace from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data trace from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position data using manufacturer's dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data trace measured via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    base:desc "Input current data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for input current measurement in permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from manufacturer's dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram model for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram model for system structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box data-driven friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASAssetDescription : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot axis asset description"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol for sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous friction identification using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of friction models and robot motion via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAdjustmentAction
]

instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset and model analysis using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetAnalysisInsight
]

instance ProblemIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Problem identification for friction understanding"
]

instance AssetAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset and model analysis using SysML"
]

instance ModelUseInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Use of Simulink models for simulation"
]

instance DataIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data identification and metadata management"
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters for adjusting robot control algorithms"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and robot motion data"
]

instance MotionAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller sending position, speed, or acceleration commands to robot axes"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearwheelGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearwheelGearbox, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, SINUMERIKController
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS), visualized in a unified dashboard for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, covering wear and operational changes over the robot's lifetime."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison of simulated data against measured data to detect friction deviations, with model parameters refined based on observed discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time transmission of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per IEC 62897, SysML (ISO/IEC 19505), UML for modeling."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Physical safety cell restricts working range to [-90°, 90°], but no DT-specific security or safety mechanisms described."
]
